common.legalFullEnglish: Mongolo wa molao o o tletseng o o dirilwe ka Sekgoa fa tlase.

nav.noNotifications: Ga go na dikitsiso go jaana

home.loadingData: E a tsenya tshedimosetso ya gago...
home.playCostNote: $0.01 USDC, USDT, or USDm on Celo per paid game. Keep a little CELO for network fees (gas).
home.approveOneTime: Amogela {token} mo letlolong la gago (ga nngwe fela)...
home.confirmInWallet: Netefatsa go simolola papadi mo letlolong la gago...
home.top100Prize: Badirisi ba 100 ba kwa godimo ba arolelana dituelo tsa motlotlo
home.telegramCta: Ikopanye le setšhaba, bona ditlhabololo le dituelo

landing.tagline: Laela ditheko tsa crypto o bona dituelo
landing.walletCostNotice: Each paid game is $0.01 in USDC, USDT, or USDm on Celo. Keep a small CELO balance for gas. Wallets may use CELO if stable gas fails.
landing.walletExtensionNote: Don’t see Phantom or “Other browser wallet”? Install Phantom (enable Ethereum) or refresh after installing a wallet.
landing.connectSubtitle: Tlhopha letlolodi: extensions pele, morago QR ya Valora fa e dirisiwe.
landing.connectValoraQrSub: WalletConnect — scan with Valora or another mobile wallet
landing.connectUserRejected: You cancelled the wallet prompt. Try again when ready.
landing.walletHint: Phantom: enable Ethereum in the extension. Valora QR: set NEXT_PUBLIC_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID (free from cloud.reown.com). Gray button: wallets that use window.ethereum.
landing.connectError: Ga e kgone go golaganya. Leka gape.
landing.termsAgree: Ka go golaganya, o dumela melawana ya rona

leaderboard.fetchError: Ga e kgone go tsenya lenaneo la ditlhopho
leaderboard.title: Lenaneo la ditlhopho
leaderboard.monthlyTournamentDesc: Kgaisano ya kgwedi e a simolola Phupu 1 e bile e fela Motswedi 1
leaderboard.monthlyTournamentSub: Badirisi ba kwa godimo ba bona tuelo ya nnete kgweding le kgweding
leaderboard.top100Extra: 🎁 Badirisi ba 100 ba kwa godimo ba arolelana dituelo tsa motlotlo
leaderboard.noData: Ga go na tshedimosetso ya lenaneo ga jaana

profile.supportSubtitle: Bega mathata kgotsa bona thuso ka Telegram
profile.noTrades: Ga go na ditshekatsheko ga jaana
profile.noTradesHint: Simolola go tshameka go aga ditiragalo tsa gago!

airdrop.title: Dituelo
airdrop.holdIntro: Tshwara TPOINT tsa gago go bula dituelo le ditirelo tse di kgethegileng!
airdrop.periodicalPrizesDesc: Nna kwa godimo mo Lenaneong o bona dituelo ka go MiniPay ka nako.
airdrop.maximizeScoreDesc: Dira dintlha tse di kwa godimo mo papading nngwe le nngwe. Ikgantshetshe!
airdrop.leaveProfitDesc: O ka tsamaya o na le phaelo — go feta le 🪙10 000+. Badirisi ba bona ba kgona go feta!
airdrop.leaderboardBanner: 🏆 Badirisi ba kwa godimo ba bona dituelo ka MiniPay. Tshameka o tswelele!
airdrop.airdropBlurb: Tshwara dituelo! Lenaneo la rona le tla fa badirisi ba Tradcast ba ba tshegetšang ditokene tse di kgethegileng.

tradearea.gameBusyDesc: Seva e na le batho ba bantsi. Leka gape morago ga nako.
tradearea.fundsReturned: 💰 Madi a gago le tefelo di tla busetswa.
tradearea.activePositionDesc: O tshwanetse go tswala maemo pele o tswa.
tradearea.liquidatedDesc: Seelo sa gago se ile go fitlha 🪙0. Leba sentle nakong e e latelang!
tradearea.gameOverDesc: Nako ya papadi ya gago e fedile.
tradearea.statusGameEnded: Papadi e fedile! E a fetola...
tradearea.statusTxRejected: Tshekatsheko e gannwe — o ka ntse o tswa
tradearea.statusInsufficientGas: CELO e sa lekaneng mo dituelong tsa gas

about.mainP1: Tradcast ke papadi ya boitekenegi ya dithekgo tsa nnete. Tshedimosetso yotlhe ke ya mmaraka wa nnete e e kopantsweng.
about.mainP2: Ikgatha ntle le kotsi ya madi. Ithute go bala ditshate le go laola maemo.
about.longExpl: LONG: Bula kgotsa oketsa 🪙100 mo maemong wa long. Phaelo fa theko e a godima.
about.shortExpl: SHORT: Bula kgotsa oketsa 🪙100 mo maemong wa short. Phaelo fa theko e a theoga.
about.closeExpl: TSWALA: Tswala maemo o bona phaelo kgotsa phoso.
about.rule1: Ga o ka ke wa bula LONG le SHORT ka nako e le nngwe
about.rule2: Ga go na hedge mo papading e
about.rule3: Go fetola tsela, tswala maemo pele
about.rule4: Maemo o mongwe le o mongwe o dirisa leverage ya 20×
about.flow1: Simolola papadi o lebelele chate ya nako ya nnete
about.flow2: Bula maemo ka LONG kgotsa SHORT
about.flow3: Tswala fa o ikemiseditse go bona phaelo kgotsa go fokotsa phoso
about.flow4: Tobetsa "Reka le Tswa" go bona ditokene tsa TPOINT
about.flow5: Boela lehaeng o na le dituelo tsa gago!
about.feat1Desc: Ithekise ka ditshutiso tsa nnete tsa dimaraka tsa crypto.
about.feat2Desc: Maemo otlhe a dirisa leverage ya 20× (phaelo le phoso di oketsegile).
about.feat3Desc: Bona phaelo mo ditshekatshekong o bona TPOINT jaaka dituelo.
about.feat4Desc: Igodimo mo lenaneong o bontsha ditiragalo tsa gago.
about.footerNote: Simolola go ithuta jaanong go itse fa go botlhokwa!
about.supportHint: O na le bothata? Re romele mo Telegram
